title: crotalaria nyikensis
intro: Crotalaria nyikensis, also known as Nyika rattle box or Nyika bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub that is native to Malawi, where it grows in the mountainous regions of the Nyika Plateau. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, Crotalaria nyikensis is prepared by boiling its leaves or roots in water to create a decoction or infusion, which is then used to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
